# Breaking Change Reviewer Skill

This skill covers changes that may alter durable repo behavior, including model semantics, compare
logic, extraction completeness, package layout, CLI workflows, docs guarantees, and platform
compatibility assumptions.

## Use this skill when changing
- durable semantic behavior
- public package/tool/sdk workflows
- generated project layout
- compare/deploy or extraction contracts
- package/runtime layout
- version/platform support statements
